meaning: adv.向一旁,向侧面地,斜地里adj.一旁的,向侧面的
examples: She slid him a sideways glance.
She sat sideways on the chair.
She shot him a sideways glance.
If the valuation judgments are right, you should make money whether the market goes up, down or sideways.
The Spyder Trust ( SPY) moved sideways for the following three weeks before it dropped sharply.
